summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Panel for SuperAdmin completed. Backend: All 24 API tests passed (Branding CRUD, Theme Presets, Plans CRUD, Email Templates CRUD + Preview). Frontend: All 3 admin pages (Branding, Plans, Email Templates) working correctly with proper sidebar integration and dialogs.

issues: React console warning about setState during render in HashRouter/Login components - not critical but should be addressed

passed_tests: Backend: Admin endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
Backend: GET /api/admin/branding - Returns branding config with all fields
Backend: PUT /api/admin/branding - Updates branding successfully
Backend: PUT /api/admin/branding - Updates colors correctly
Backend: Branding changes persist after GET
Backend: GET /api/admin/theme-presets - Returns all 7 presets (default, ocean, forest, sunset, royal, slate, rose)
Backend: POST /api/admin/branding/apply-preset/{key} - Applies theme correctly
Backend: POST /api/admin/branding/apply-preset/invalid - Returns 404
Backend: GET /api/admin/plans - Returns list of plans
Backend: POST /api/admin/plans - Creates new plan with all fields
Backend: PUT /api/admin/plans/{id} - Updates plan successfully
Backend: PUT /api/admin/plans/invalid-id - Returns 404
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/plans/{id} - Deletes plan and verifies removal
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/plans/invalid-id - Returns 404
Backend: GET /api/admin/email-templates - Returns 3 default templates (welcome, password_reset, subscription_change)
Backend: Templates have all required fields (id, name, key, subject, html_content)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/email-templates/{id} - Updates template
Backend: POST /api/admin/email-templates/{id}/preview - Generates preview with variables replaced
Backend: POST /api/admin/email-templates - Creates custom template
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/email-templates/{id} - Deletes custom template
Backend: DELETE default templates - Returns 400 (cannot delete defaults)
Backend: POST /api/admin/email-templates/reset-defaults - Resets templates
Backend: GET /api/branding/public - Works without auth
Backend: Cleanup restores branding to defaults
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Administración' section for SuperAdmin only
Frontend: Admin menu expands with all items (Dashboard Admin, Usuarios, Planes, Personalización, Config. Email, Plantillas Email)
Frontend: Admin Branding page loads with 4 tabs (General, Imágenes, Colores, Vista Previa)
Frontend: Branding - General tab has app name, slogan, footer text inputs
Frontend: Branding - Colors tab shows all 7 theme presets with clickable buttons
Frontend: Branding - Vista Previa tab shows live preview with header, cards, buttons, footer
Frontend: Admin Plans page shows 4 existing plans (Free, Starter, Professional, Enterprise)
Frontend: Plans - 'Nuevo Plan' button opens dialog with all fields
Frontend: Plans - Dialog has name, order, description, pricing, limits, features, default toggle
Frontend: Admin Email Templates page shows 3 default templates
Frontend: Templates - 'Vista previa' button shows rendered email preview
Frontend: Templates - 'Editar' button opens dialog with HTML editor
Frontend: Templates - Editor has tabs (HTML, Texto plano, Variables)
Frontend: Templates - 'Restablecer' and 'Nueva Plantilla' buttons present
critical_code_review_comments: Admin routes properly protected with get_superadmin_user dependency
Branding config uses MongoDB upsert pattern for safe updates
Plans endpoint correctly handles is_default flag by unsetting others first
Email templates prevent deletion of default keys (welcome, password_reset, subscription_change)
Preview endpoint properly replaces all variables with sample data
Frontend sidebar correctly checks user.role === 'superadmin' for admin section visibility
All admin pages have proper redirect to '/' if user is not superadmin
seed_data_creation: Used existing 4 plans (Free, Starter, Professional, Enterprise) and 3 email templates (welcome, password_reset, subscription_change). Test cleanup restores branding to defaults.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Panel implementation is complete. All CRUD operations for branding, plans, and email templates are working. Sidebar 'Administración' section expands to show admin menu items only for superadmin users. Theme presets allow quick color scheme changes. Email template preview renders HTML with sample data.

ui_elements: Plan cards with pricing and limits

sidebar_integration.admin_section: Expandable 'Administración' section visible only for role=superadmin

notes.no_mocked_functionality: All APIs are fully functional. Image upload (logo/favicon) saves to /app/uploads/.
notes.react_warning: Minor React console warning about setState during render - does not affect functionality
